nl_query: For each student who filed a revaluation request that was approved, show their name, original final marks, revaluation attempt total marks, the absolute difference, and whether the difference exceeds the board's configured deviation threshold.
failed_sql:
SELECT sc.name AS student_name, r.original_final_marks, ea.total_marks, ABS(ea.total_marks - r.original_final_marks) AS difference, ep.deviation_threshold, CASE WHEN ABS(ea.total_marks - r.original_final_marks) > ep.deviation_threshold THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS exceeds_threshold
FROM   revaluation_request rr
JOIN   answer_script       a  ON a.id  = rr.script_id
JOIN   student_cache       sc ON sc.id = a.student_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.resulting_attempt_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_policy ep ON ep.board_id = a.course_id
JOIN   result r ON r.script_id = a.id
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER  BY sc.name ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'ea.resulting_attempt_id' does not exist. The Postgres planner suggests 'rr.resulting_attempt_id' — use that, or verify the column belongs to the qualifying table in your FROM/JOIN clauses.
